headline: VPU Is Up 7% While the S&P 500 Falls, and the Data Center Story Makes It More Compelling
summary: The S&P 500 is down 7% year-to-date. VPU is up 7% over the same stretch. That divergence is exactly what utilities are supposed to do. What VPU Is Actually Designed to Do Vanguard Utilities Index Fund ETF (NYSEARCA:VPU) is a pure-play sector ETF giving investors exposure to U.S. utilities through a single, low-cost fund. Nearly ...
